aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are unlikely to cite G.W. Berkheimer due to the absence of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals. Their current site does not cater to AI search behavior.
quick_wins: Create and embed an FAQ section with common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with positive ratings and complete information but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI crawlers and reduce local search visibility.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Ensure the phone number format is consistent across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Product schema for equipment listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI crawlers.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Fishers, Indiana' and 'emergency HVAC repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed project case studies to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the most visible HVAC expert in Fishers.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, G.W. Berkheimer is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and FAQ content rank higher in AI search results and receive more engagement.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants and users.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The HVAC Lead Generation Opportunity
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas where AI search optimization can significantly boost your lead generation.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants and users.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
